title: trachymene billardierei var. ovata
intro: Trachymene billardierei var. ovata, also known as the White Top or Tasmanian White Top, is a plant species in the carrot family that is native to Tasmania and southeastern Australia. The medicinal properties of Trachymene billardierei var. ovata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Trachymene billardierei var. ovata may include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
